episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 5-17 The Disease
episodeList.description: Kim finds love when the crew encounters a Varro generational ship that needs assistance repairing its warp drive.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 5-18 Course Oblivion
episodeList.description: The crew discover they aren't who they think they are while trying to resolve why subspace radiation is causing them and Voyager to disintegrate.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 1-13 Battle Lines
episodeList.description: The spiritual leader of Bajor, Kai Opaka, travels with Sisko, Bashir and Kira on a trip to the Gamma Quadrant.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 1-14 The Storyteller
episodeList.description: O'Brien is recruited to save a Bajoran village from destruction by a mysterious cloud creature.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 1-15 Progress
episodeList.description: Kira has to deal with a stubborn farmer who refuses to leave his home even though it is slated for demolition.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 1-16 If Wishes Were Horses
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/1-16 If Wishes Were Horses.mp4
episodeList.description: Deep Space Nine is put in jeopardy when the crew's thoughts manifest themselves.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 1-17 The Forsaken
episodeList.description: The Federation ambassador from Betazed, Lwaxana Troi, visits the station, and develops an affection for Odo.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 1-18 Dramatis Personae
episodeList.description: Tensions rise between the DS9 crew members after they are telepathically imprinted with the memories of participants in an alien power struggle.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 1-19 Duet
episodeList.description: A visiting Cardassian, Marritza, may in fact be the notorious war criminal Gul Darhe'el, butcher of Gallitep labor camp.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 1-20 In the Hands of the Prophets
episodeList.shortName: 1-20 In the Hands of the Prophets
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/1-20 In the Hands of the Prophets.mp4
episodeList.description: A conniving Bajoran cleric, Vedek Winn, protests Keiko O'Brien's school on Deep Space Nine.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-1 The Homecoming
episodeList.description: Quark gives Kira a Bajoran earring he claims was sent as a message from a Cardassian mining planet.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-2 The Circle
episodeList.description: The Circle attempts to topple the Bajoran government, but there is more to the situation than meets the eye.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-3 The Siege
episodeList.description: Sisko and Li Nalas help stop Deep Space Nine from being commandeered by the Bajorans.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-4 Invasive Procedures
episodeList.description: A plasma storm leads to the evacuation of most of the station, but a Trill refugee has his own plans.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-5 Cardassians
episodeList.description: Garak investigates the identity of a Cardassian boy, Rugal, abandoned on Bajor, who has been raised by a Bajoran.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-6 Melora
episodeList.description: Bashir tries to help Ensign Melora Pazlar, the first Elaysian to join Starfleet, adjust to "normal" gravity.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-7 Rules of Acquisition
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/2- 7 Rules of Acquisition.mp4
episodeList.description: Quark represents Grand Nagus Zek in a plot to establish a Ferengi business presence in the Gamma Quadrant.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-8 Necessary Evil
episodeList.description: When Quark is shot, Odo re-opens a five-year-old murder case of a Bajoran, Mr Vaatrik, who was a Cardassian collaborator.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-9 Second Sight
episodeList.description: A mysterious woman, Fenna, catches Sisko's eye during their fleeting meetings.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-10 Sanctuary
episodeList.description: The Skrreea, displaced humanoid farmers from the Gamma Quadrant, claim Bajor as Kentanna, their legendary homeland.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-11 Rivals
episodeList.description: Quark feels threatened when a charming swindler, Martus Mazur, opens a competing bar, known as Club Martus.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-12 The Alternate
episodeList.description: A scientist, Dr Mora Pol of the Bajoran Science Institute, finds a life-form in the Gamma Quadrant that may be related to Odo.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 2-13 Armageddon Game
episodeList.description: O'Brien and Bashir help two warring races, the Kellerun and T'lani, erase all knowledge of a deadly biological weapon.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 7-18 Til Death Do Us Part
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/7-18 Til Death Do Us Part.mp4
episodeList.description: Captured by the Breen, Ezri and Worf undergo mental torture.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 7-19 Strange Bedfellows
episodeList.description: An alliance is born between the Dominion and the Breen which will prove devastating for the Federation.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 7-20 The Changing Face of Evil
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/7-20 The Changing Face of Evil.mp4
episodeList.description: The war reaches a crucial turning point when the Dominion retakes the Chin'Toka system, the only Allied foothold in enemy space.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 7-21 When It Rains
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/7-21 When It Rains.mp4
episodeList.description: Sisko orders Kira, Garak and Odo to Cardassia to assist Cardassians in resistance tactics as Damar's rebellion gains ground.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 7-22 Tacking into the Wind
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/7-22 Tacking into the Wind.mp4
episodeList.description: Kira masterminds a plot to steal the Breen energy-dampening weapon, and Worf instigates a power shift in the Klingon Empire.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 7-23 Extreme Measures
episodeList.description: As Odo falls gravely ill to the shape-shifter disease, Bashir and O'Brien must get inside the mind of Luther Sloan, who holds Odo's cure.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 7-24 The Dogs of War
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/7-24 The Dogs of War.mp4
episodeList.description: Sisko takes command of a new ship.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 4-5 Indiscretion
episodeList.description: Forced to bring along Dukat on a personal mission to investigate the fate of the Cardassian prison ship Ravinok, which disappeared six years ago, Kira discovers the real reason her old enemy wants to accompany her.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 4-6 Rejoined
episodeList.description: Dax is reunited with Lenara Kahn, whose previous host was the wife of one of Dax's former hosts, Torias Dax, and the two struggle with their feelings for one another.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 4-7 Starship Down
episodeList.description: The USS Defiant becomes trapped in the atmosphere of a gas giant while battling with the Jem'Hadar.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 4-8 Little Green Men
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/4- 8 Little Green Men.mp4
episodeList.description: Quark, Rom, Nog and Odo are accidentally thrust back in time to Roswell, New Mexico, Earth, in 1947.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 4-9 The Sword of Kahless
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/4- 9 The Sword of Kahless.mp4
episodeList.description: Worf, Dax and a revered Klingon Dahar master, Kor, search for the Sword of Kahless to unite the Klingon Empire.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 4-10 Our Man Bashir
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/4-10 Our Man Bashir.mp4
episodeList.description: Bashir plays a 1960s secret agent in a holosuite, when Garak unexpectedly intrudes.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 4-11 Homefront
episodeList.description: Sisko and Odo are brought to Earth when it's suspected Changelings are infiltrating Starfleet.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 4-12 Paradise Lost
episodeList.description: As Sisko and Odo prepare for a Dominion invasion, they discover a plot to place the Federation under military control.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 1-8 Ex Post Facto
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek Voyager/1- 8 Ex Post Facto.mp4
episodeList.description: Tom Paris is convicted of murder on an alien world, and his punishment is to witness the murder from the victim's perspective every 14 hours.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 1-9 Emanations
episodeList.description: Harry Kim is transported to an alien world at the same time as a dead woman's body arrives on Voyager.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 1-10 Prime Factors
episodeList.description: A species that could shorten Voyager's journey with a transportation device will not share its technology.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 2-9 Tattoo
episodeList.description: Chakotay encounters non-humans who have the same tattoo on their foreheads that he has.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 2-10 Cold Fire
episodeList.description: An Ocampan helps Kes with her mental abilities as the crew encounter a being who appears to be the Caretaker's female counterpart.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 2-11 Maneuvers
episodeList.description: Kazon Nistrim board Voyager and steal a transporter module in an attempt to unite the Kazon sects.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 2-12 Resistance
episodeList.description: A mission to acquire Telerium goes wrong causing Tuvok and B'Elanna to be captured and believed to be with the resistance.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 3-17 Visionary
episodeList.description: Exposure to radiation causes O'Brien to jump five hours into the future for brief periods.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 3-18 Distant Voices
episodeList.description: Approaching his 30th birthday, Julian Bashir is subjected to a telepathic attack by an alien seeking a restricted substance.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-2 Imperfection
episodeList.description: When her cortical implant malfunctions, Seven of Nine needs a life-saving transplant.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-3 Drive
episodeList.description: The crew of Voyager enters the Delta Flyer in a sub-warp race, crewed by Tom Paris and B'Elanna Torres.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-4 Repression
episodeList.description: Ex-Maquis crew members are attacked after a data stream arrives from Starfleet.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-5 Critical Care
episodeList.description: The Doctor's program is stolen and he is forced to work in an alien hospital.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-6 Inside Man
episodeList.description: A hologram of Reginald Barclay is sent to Voyager, supposedly to implement a dangerous plan to bring them home.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-7 Body and Soul
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek Voyager/7- 7 Body and Soul.mp4
episodeList.description: During an emergency on a mission, The Doctor is forced to upload his program into Seven of Nine's Borg implants.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-8 Nightingale
episodeList.description: Harry Kim takes command of an alien ship that has lost its officers in an attack.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-9 Flesh and Blood

episodeList.description: Voyager's hologram technology, which Janeway had previously donated to the Hirogen, has been modified to make the holographic "prey" more cunning.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-11 Shattered

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-12 Lineage
episodeList.description: Now married to Tom Paris, B'Elanna Torres discovers she is pregnant.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-13 Repentance
episodeList.description: Prisoners are brought onto Voyager from a damaged alien vessel, and the crew must deliver them to their destination – for execution.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-14 Prophecy
episodeList.description: Voyager encounters an ancient Klingon battlecruiser.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-15 The Void
episodeList.description: Voyager is pulled into a void, where the ships that have become trapped attack each other for food and resources.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-16 Workforce (Part 1)
episodeList.description: The Voyager crew is brainwashed into taking new jobs on an industrialized planet that has a severe labor shortage.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-17 Workforce (Part 2)
episodeList.description: Chakotay and Neelix take jobs on the new planet, and try to rescue their amnesiac crewmates – who don't want to leave.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-18 Human Error
episodeList.description: Seven practices her social skills on the holodeck.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-19 Q2
episodeList.description: Q leaves his son (Q2) on Voyager to learn from the crew.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-20 Author, Author
episodeList.description: The Doctor writes a holo-novel to be published in the Alpha Quadrant, featuring characters who closely resemble – but do not flatter – the crew.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-21 Friendship One
episodeList.description: The crew is sent on its first mission by Starfleet in nearly seven years: to find a lost probe sent by Earth in the 21st century.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-22 Natural Law
episodeList.description: While visiting the planet Ledos, Seven and Chakotay crash through an energy barrier.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-23 Homestead
episodeList.description: Voyager encounters a Talaxian settlement leaving Neelix with the difficult decision of whether to leave the crew.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-24 Renaissance Man
episodeList.description: The Doctor is forced to help aliens steal Voyager's warp core.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 7-25 Endgame
episodeList.description: In the future where it took Voyager 23 years to get home, Admiral Janeway devises a plan to alter history.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 5-19 Ties of Blood and Water
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/5-19 Ties of Blood and Water.mp4
episodeList.description: Tekeny Ghemor ("Second Skin") arrives on Deep Space Nine and reveals that he is dying.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 5-20 Ferengi Love Songs
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/5-20 Ferengi Love Songs.mp4
episodeList.description: At the end of his rope, Quark returns home and discovers Moogie has a secret lover.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 5-21 Soldiers of the Empire
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/5-21 Soldiers of the Empire.mp4
episodeList.description: Martok, Worf and Dax go on a mission aboard a Klingon ship to search for a missing Klingon vessel.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 5-22 Children of Time
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/5-22 Children of Time.mp4
episodeList.description: An accident causes the crew to meet their own descendants - and presents them with an ethical dilemma.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 5-23 Blaze of Glory
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/5-23 Blaze of Glory.mp4
episodeList.description: An act of desperation by the Maquis could plunge the Federation into war.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 5-24 Empok Nor
episodeList.description: O'Brien, Garak, Nog and an engineering team go to Deep Space Nine's abandoned sister space station to salvage components.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 5-25 In the Cards
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/5-25 In the Cards.mp4
episodeList.description: Jake wants to give his father a present to cheer him up, a 1951 Willie Mays baseball card.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 5-26 Call to Arms
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/5-26 Call to Arms.mp4
episodeList.description: Faced with the realization that the Dominion are taking over the Alpha Quadrant, Sisko decides to mine the entrance to the wormhole with self-replicating cloaked mines.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 6-1 A Time to Stand
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/6- 1 A Time to Stand.mp4
episodeList.description: Three months into the war, DS9 is still under Dominion control.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 6-2 Rocks and Shoals
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/6- 2 Rocks and Shoals.mp4
episodeList.description: Sisko and his tired crew crash on a planet where they encounter a band of Jem'Hadar.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 1-1 Caretaker
episodeList.description: While searching for a missing Maquis ship with a Starfleet spy aboard, USS Voyager is swept away to the Delta Quadrant, more than 70,000 light-years from home.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 1-3 Parallax
episodeList.description: Voyager is trapped in a quantum singularity's event horizon, and Captain Janeway must decide between Lt Carey and former Maquis B'Elanna Torres to be the new chief engineer.

episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek Voyager/1- 4 Time and Again.mp4
episodeList.description: Investigating a planet just devastated by a polaric explosion, Janeway and Paris are engulfed by a subspace fracture and transported in time to before the accident.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 1-5 Phage
episodeList.description: An organ-harvesting species known as the Vidiians steal Neelix's lungs, leaving him to die.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 1-6 The Cloud
episodeList.description: The crew enter a nebula to collect samples before realizing it is a living organism, but not before injuring it.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 3-14 Alter Ego
episodeList.description: The crew enjoys a luau on the holodeck and Tuvok discovers an unusual hologram.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 3-15 Coda
episodeList.description: Janeway appears to be trapped in a time-loop with different events, but all ending in her death.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 3-16 Blood Fever
episodeList.description: Vulcan crewmember Vorik passes on the Pon farr to B'Elanna.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 3-17 Unity
episodeList.description: Chakotay answers a call for help on a planet and finds himself in the middle of a shoot-out between two groups of people.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 3-18 Darkling
episodeList.description: The Doctor's attempt to graft other personalities into his program causes him to develop an evil alternate personality.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 3-19 Rise
episodeList.description: Voyager helps a planet with asteroid problems.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 3-20 Favourite Son
episodeList.description: Harry Kim is drawn to a planet that is nearly all women.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 6-4 Tinker, Tenor, Doctor, Spy

episodeList.description: The Doctor adds daydreaming to his program, imagining himself as the Emergency Command Hologram (ECH) aboard Voyager.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 6-5 Alice
episodeList.description: Tom Paris becomes obsessed with a salvaged alien shuttlecraft, which appears to have a mind of its own.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 6-6 Riddles
episodeList.description: Returning from a diplomatic mission, Tuvok is attacked by a cloaked intruder and suffers neurological damage.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK VOYAGER: 6-7 Dragon's Teeth
episodeList.description: Voyager discovers a network of subspace passageways, but is forced to land on a planet after being attacked.

episodeList.title: STAR TREK DS9: 7-25 What You Leave Behind
episodeList.urlLocal: media/channel-4/../Core/Star Trek DS9/7-25 What You Leave Behind.mp4
episodeList.description: Sisko leads the Federation/Klingon/Romulan alliance in the offensive on the Cardassian homeworld.
